bullets: FLIP OUT FUN - Experience thrilling action with this remote control stunt car! It performs impressive wheel flips and 360 spins, providing lots of excitement for your little stunt driver.
SUPER FAST PERFORMANCE - This RC car races at an exhilarating 8 km/h with soft rubber tyres for maximum grip and LED lights to show the way!

STUNTS GALORE - Equipped with rotating axles, this remote control stunt racer can turn in any direction, making it perfect for performing awesome stunts. Watch your child master daring tricks and manoeuvres.

EYE-CATCHING DESIGN - The  remote control stunt racer comes in a striking purple/turquoise deco, making it stand out in any crowd. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor play, it’s a fantastic gift choice for kids aged 3 years and above.
REAL PERFORMANCE MACHINES - Bladez RPM perfectly blends high performance with style making it perfect for kids and adults alike!
content.description: The Bladez RPM RC Stunt Racer tumbles, spins and races at high speed. Featuring bright LED lights and easy to drive handset it’s the ultimate stunt machine!

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x Radio Control Stunt Racer, 1 x Controller, 1 x Instruction Manual

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
